Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Stipulation And (Proposed) Order Re: Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-01-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
PLAINTIFF RUSSELL BRIMER'S MOTION To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement IS GRANTED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE WARNING PROVISIONS ARE ADEQUATE AND THE PROPOSED FEES AND PENALTY ARE REASONABLE. NO OPPOSITION FILED. Moving party is to submit a proposed form of order. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Joyce Long, CSR # 8620
